response.justification: James is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of software development experience, current Staff-level tenure, and relevant exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI/GenAI experience only began in 2025. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and no evidence of customer-facing technical discovery leadership at enterprise scale, making him a weak fit for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure
Deep full-stack experience with Python-adjacent polyglot skills, strong TypeScript/Node.js, and AWS (CDK) production work
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, conference talks)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development requirement (~1 year of AI-related work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No evidence of enterprise customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery leadership experience

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and MCP exposure
